theme: Lisbon: Europe's Rising Star for Incentive Travel

linkedin.text:
London and Paris are quietly the most expensive mistakes in your event budget.

After 16 years and 200+ events across Europe, Lisbon has become our top 2026 recommendation — and the math is hard to argue with.

Why it works for incentive groups:
🌊 Alfama, Belém, Sintra's palaces — three different energies, all within 40 minutes
🍷 Michelin dining at half the Paris price point
✈️ 3-4h flights, TAP direct from 40+ cities, no transit hassle
💰 30-40% more budget efficiency for comparable quality
🏨 Palaces, rooftops, converted wine cellars — every dinner feels like the event

We ran a 65-person tech incentive there last October. Feedback: 9.6/10. Three companies in their network asked us to replicate it.

📅 Book a free 30-minute planning call and we'll cost out Lisbon against your current shortlist.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership

✅ 4hr flights from anywhere in Europe

9.6/10 from our last group there 🏆

facebook.text:
A tech client asked us for "somewhere different" last year. We said Lisbon. They were skeptical. 🌊

Then they had dinner in a converted wine cellar, spent a morning in Sintra's palaces, and ate Michelin-level food for half what Paris would've cost.

Final feedback score: 9.6/10. Three companies in their network have since asked us to do the same.

Lisbon quietly does what London and Paris can't: 30-40% more value, 40 minutes between palaces and waterfront, and venues that feel like the event itself.

Where's your team headed in 2026? Tell us in the comments — or send us a message and we'll build you a Lisbon plan. 💬
